use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF HYPOACTIVE SEXUAL DESIRE DISORDER (HSDD)

TREATING ACQUIRED, GENERALIZED HYPOACTIVE SEXUAL DESIRE DISORDER (HSDD) IN A PREMENOPAUSAL FEMALE PATIENT WITH CONTROLLED HYPERTENSION BY INJECTING BREMELANOTIDE MORE THAN ONCE WITH AT LEAST 24 HOURS BETWEEN DOSES AND NO MORE THAN 8 DOSES PER MONTH
